guardrails: W1.5.215 executes only the W1.5.214 stream final acceptance blocker repair track for FR-009, FR-010, and FR-016.

W1.5.215 does not execute runtime UX blocker repairs, A8 Git-history conformance repairs, runtime/Desktop production behavior, accepted spec changes, ADR changes, schema changes, generated schema changes, dependency changes, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx changes.
No repair field may mark any FR accepted, ready, completed, implemented, or phase-exit satisfied.

Stream acceptance repair evidence remains metadata-only and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, credentials, or user staged file content.
FR-015 remains excluded while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
accepted_items and implemented_items remain zero; EXIT-P1-1 and EXIT-P1-10 remain not_ready.

repair_items.objective: Package first-viewport default collapsed stream evidence for a future A4 decision without marking FR-009 accepted.

Kept formal A4 accept or reject decision outside this slice.
source_acceptance_blockers: The evidence is still matrix metadata and does not record formal first-viewport A4 acceptance.
A phase-level UX acceptance artifact must explicitly accept or reject the default collapsed stream path.
remaining_acceptance_blockers: Formal A4 reviewer acceptance or rejection for the default collapsed stream path is still not recorded.
FR-009 remains blocked until the reviewer decision record consumes this repaired stream evidence package.

remaining_acceptance_blockers: Formal A4 reviewer acceptance or rejection for expanded stream readability is still not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Package final user-facing event classification evidence for a future A4 decision without marking FR-016 accepted.

The labels still need phase-level stream evidence in a reviewer-approved context.
remaining_acceptance_blockers: Formal A4 reviewer acceptance or rejection for final event labels is still not recorded.
FR-016 remains blocked until the reviewer decision record consumes this repaired stream evidence package.
